name: nearform-sql
description: Use this skill when writing, reviewing, or refactoring database queries with @nearform/sql — Nearform's tagged-template library that produces SQL-injection-safe parameterized queries for pg, mysql, and mysql2. Covers installation, the SQL tag (.text/.sql/.values/.debug), helpers (glue, map, unsafe, quoteIdent), Fastify integration, dynamic/bulk queries, and security best practices.
